---
title: "week5b"
author: "Radzhana Rabdanova"
format: html
editor: visual
---

#Load library

#1.Read_csv.

chess_ELO \<- read_csv(

```         
chess_ELO <- read_csv("C:\\Users\\radzh\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\data 607\\project1\\viewer_datatable.html")
```

```         
head(chess_ELO)
```

#Source: FIDE Handbook, Section B.02 (Official Rating System).<https://handbook.fide.com/chapter/B022017>
